channel.title: Networking on Abhinav Agarwalla
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on Abhinav Agarwalla

item.title: Implemented Floodsub from scratch
item.description:
Wrote a Floodsub module for scratch in my experimental p2p stack.

Learned a great deal how pubsub broadcasting systems behave under the hood with complex rust async designs. Getting ready to write Gossipsub now.

item.title: Started writing a p2p stack in Rust
item.description: Started writing an experimental p2p stack, rnet inspired from libp2p specs, to dig deeper into rust and core p2p mechanics.

item.title: Hackathon win @ETHNewDelhi'25
item.description: Attended an IRL hackathon in New Delhi. Built a p2p federated learning platform using libp2p(-py), Akave-O3 and Hedera hashgraph. Won the Filecoin/Akave track at ETHNewDelhi'25.

item.title: Learning document on iptables
item.description: Found a great document to learn about firewall management and iptables in deep.

item.title: Built a VPN gateway with Wireguard
item.description:
Built a VPN gateway using Wireguard, Docker and a nginx server, restricting the server access to only allow wireguard-client IP addresses by modifying the firefall rules for the docker network.

It was fun, wrote a blog about this.
